== Notes for [[Item:Q105785|Q105785]] ==

From ''Banu Taym'' Tribe (Part of ''Banu Quraysh'' Tribe).

* Wilaadat (Birth):
* Wafaat (Death):

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Banu_Taym

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Umm_Kulthum_bint_Abu_Bakr

Source 3: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Talha_ibn_Ubayd-Allah

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000003493135087

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
